config.stacksizeadjuster.title: Stack Size Adjuster
config.stacksizeadjuster.option.limit_64: Limit for items that normally stack to 64. Default: 64. WARNING: Limits above 1,000,000,000 (1 billion) can cause integer overflows when merging stacks, causing items to vanish.
config.stacksizeadjuster.option.limit_16: Limit for items that normally stack to 16. Default: 16. WARNING: Limits above 1,000,000,000 (1 billion) can cause integer overflows when merging stacks, causing items to vanish.
Limit for items that normally do not stack. Default: 1. WARNING: Limits above 1,000,000,000 (1 billion) can cause integer overflows when merging stacks, causing items to vanish.
gamerule.stack-size-adjuster.items_64_li: Maximum stack size for items that naturally stack to 64. WARNING: Keep under 1 billion to prevent inventory merging overflows.
gamerule.stack-size-adjuster.items_16_li: Maximum stack size for items that naturally stack to 16. WARNING: Keep under 1 billion to prevent inventory merging overflows.
gamerule.stack-size-adjuster.items_1_lim: Maximum stack size for items that naturally stack to 1. WARNING: Keep under 1 billion to prevent inventory merging overflows.
